name: Corn Meal Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease 12 2 1/2-inch muffin cups.
2. Heat oven to 425 degrees F (220 degrees C).
3. Sift flour, baking powder, sugar, and salt into a medium-sized bowl.
4. Add cornmeal and stir until well mixed.
5. In a small bowl, beat eggs with a fork.
6. Add milk and oil to the beaten eggs and mix well.
7. Add all ingredients at once to the dry ingredients and stir only until the dry ingredients are moistened. The batter will be lumpy.
8. Drop the batter from a tablespoon into the prepared muffin cups, filling each cup about 1/2 to 2/3 full.
9. Bake for 15 to 20 minutes, or until golden brown.
10. Remove and serve hot with butter, bacon, and eggs.
